name: Potato-Stuffed Green Peppers (Vrg)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Slice away the tops of the green bell peppers below the stems.
3. Remove seeds and interior spines from the peppers.
4. Gently parboil the peppers for about 5 minutes, then drain upside down.
5. Set the peppers aside.
6. Sauté onions and red pepper in oil until soft. Add seasonings and mix well into mashed potatoes.
7. Carefully stuff the peppers with the potato mixture.
8. Place the stuffed peppers in a deep-sided baking dish.
9. Pour tomato sauce around the base of the peppers.
10. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20 minutes, covered.
11. Uncover and bake an additional 5 minutes longer.
12. Serve warm.
Total Calories Per Serving: 197
Fat: 8 grams
